pages.text:
BUYING GUIDE
EKTORP
Sofa series


MODELS:
Armchair
Loveseat
Sofa 3.5
Sectional, 3-seat
Sectional, 4-seat corner
Ottoman with storage


Removable cover


Choice of cover


Washable cover

                        As you like it, as long as you like it
                        The EKTORP seating series gives you so many choices, whether you're
Coated fabric
                            looking for a comfortable armchair or an entire living room. The many
                              different covers are designed to be easily mixed and matched for a
                           personalized look. We have worked thoroughly on the practical details,
                         such as washable covers and reversible back cushions, to make EKTORP
Storage in ottoman             a personal and long-lasting choice for your home.

                            Details to appreciate, day after day
                      EKTORP has soft seat cushions that follow the contours of your body.
                        They also provide good support for your back and are strong enough
                             to use day after day. A simple yet clever detail is that the fabric back
                           cushions are reversible, so they keep fresh longer. You can also remove
 Includes a free 10-year           and wash the covers when needed. To be sure EKTORP will withstand
 limited warranty.                the demands of everyday life, we've been extra careful with important
For details visit                     details, like making strong seams and durable covers. This way, you can
                            appreciate your EKTORP for a long time!

                       Matched from the start
                      EKTORP is a series of seating furniture in different sizes and
                              for different situations. This means that you can always find
                        what you need to suit your home. We even have a wide variety
                             of easy-to-match covers. By mixing and matching different colors and
                             patterns, you can create a look that's both harmonious and
                                stylishly individual.




 Not all products may be available in all stores. See what is available at your local store by visiting

ALL THE PARTS AND PRICES


                            Armchair        Loveseat           Sofa               Sofa          Sectional, 3-seat with      Sectional,         Ottoman
                                                  2-seat            3-seat             3.5-seat        chaise on left or right    4-seat corner       with storage

Extra cover
LOFALLET beige          [PRICE]             [PRICE]            [PRICE]             [PRICE]              [PRICE]                 [PRICE]               [PRICE]
VITTARYD white          [PRICE]            [PRICE]            [PRICE]            [PRICE]               [PRICE]                [PRICE]             [PRICE]
SKAFTARP yellow         [PRICE]            [PRICE]            [PRICE]        --                 [PRICE]                [PRICE]             [PRICE]
NORDVALLA dark beige    [PRICE]            [PRICE]            [PRICE]        --                 [PRICE]                [PRICE]             [PRICE]
NORDVALLA dark gray     [PRICE]            [PRICE]            [PRICE]            [PRICE]              [PRICE]                [PRICE]             [PRICE]
LINGBO multicolor        [PRICE]            [PRICE]           [PRICE]       --                 [PRICE]                [PRICE]             [PRICE]


• LOFALLET: Cotton and polyester fabric. Machine washable.
• SKAFTARP: 100% cotton. Machine washable.
• NORDVALLA: Very strong and durable polyester cover with a nice texture. Machine washable.
• VITTARYD: Polyester and cotton fabric. Machine washable.
• LINGBO: 100% cotton fabric. Machine washable.
• SKREA: Coated fabric. Cotton and polyester (coated with polyurethane) fixed cover. Wipe clean with a damp cloth.
SERVICES
 IKEA products are designed to be taken home and assembled by you. That way, you'll save the most money. But if you would like some help, we can offer
 a range of services. Assembly and delivery services fulfilled by an Independent Service Provider. Contact your local IKEA store or visit the IKEA website
 for details:

DELIVERY SERVICE                       PICKING WITH                       ASSEMBLY SERVICE
                                      DELIVERY SERVICE


 Most of our products are designed and packaged so           We'll collect the products on your shopping list from         For online and in-store purchases,
 that you can take them home yourself. If you prefer,         throughout the store and deliver everything to your         TaskRabbit offers quick and convenient assembly
we can arrange for delivery of your purchases            home or office. See an IKEA co-worker and tell them        and mounting for your IKEA purchases made online
 directly to your home or business. Same day, next          what you're looking for and they will book and print         and in select stores. Plus, enjoy flat rate pricing
 day or same week deliveries are available. We can            your items on a customer order. Take this order to           created just for IKEA products.
 also arrange for delivery at a later date if you would          the check-outs and pay for your purchases both
 like.                                               goods and services.
                                               And you're on your way!


Services and prices may vary, please see
or talk to us in your local IKEA store.


Prices valid as of October 1, 2019 posting. Prices are subject to change.
Please see  or your local IKEA store for the most up to date pricing.
